systemic_patterns: Length inflation: 7 of 30 skills exceed 400 lines. Advanced content creeps back into base skills — the -advanced split convention is underused.
Meta-skills need examples: clarc-way, clarc-onboarding, continuous-learning-v2 score 7.1-7.4 because they describe workflows without showing them in use.
Strong reference quality: debugging-workflow, auth-patterns, docker-patterns, clarc-hooks-authoring, ci-cd-patterns, agent-reliability (8.3-8.7) set the quality bar.
